column2: ARM USDA UNL OSU Woodward Switchgrass 1
column13: GRA / The site is on a former native prairie that is in the process of changing to switchgrass / In Spring 2009, the former native prairie site was burned, cattle were put on the pasture to graze down emergent grass, and broadleaf herbicide was sprayed. In Summer 2009, the cattle were removed from the pasture, and the site was sprayed with herbicide to kill all grass. In Spring 2010, prior to the planting of switchgrass, final herbicide was sprayed to kill cheat grass and to control broadleaf plants.

In 2010, fertilization occurred before herbicide was sprayed for broadleaf control.
